case.title: YOUNG v. DIRECTOR, U.S. BUREAU OF PRISONS

opinion.h4: YOUNG v. DIRECTOR, U.S. BUREAU OF PRISONS, (1967)
"> YOUNG v. DIRECTOR, U.S. BUREAU OF PRISONS, ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE MIDDLE DISTRICT OF PENNSYLVANIA. No. 1317, Misc. Decided April 10, 1967.
opinion.p: The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction.
